prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile game UI icon sprite sheet
Primary request: Create a transparent-background sprite sheet containing 8 distinct upgrade icons for a post-apocalyptic armored car survival game.
Subject: 8 isolated icons arranged in a clean 4x2 grid, each centered in its own cell with generous padding
Icons to include:
1. damage boost
2. fire rate boost
3. multishot
4. pierce
5. chain lightning
6. explosion radius
7. slow effect
8. shield
Style: premium mobile game UI icons, wasteland mech aesthetic, industrial metal details, warning-yellow and amber highlights, clean silhouette readability
Lighting: subtle glow, crisp rim light, game-ready clarity
Color palette: steel gray, dark brown, amber orange, warning yellow, small cyan accents only where needed
Background: fully transparent
Composition: one icon per cell, evenly spaced, no overlap, no cropped edges
Avoid: text, numbers, logos, frames, clutter, photorealism, purple cyberpunk style

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile game item icon sprite sheet
Primary request: Create a transparent-background sprite sheet containing 6 collectible item icons for a post-apocalyptic armored car survival game.
Subject: isolated reward items arranged in a clean grid with padding
Items to include:
1. coin
2. mechanical parts
3. rare chip
4. supply emblem token
5. rare chest token
6. energy core
Style: premium mobile game loot icons, wasteland-industrial theme, collectible readability, polished but slightly rugged
Lighting: bright readable highlights, subtle glow, strong silhouette
Color palette: brass gold, steel gray, orange amber, worn metal, small red warning accents
Background: fully transparent
Composition: each item centered in its own cell, no overlap, no cropping
Avoid: text, labels, frames, UI panels, realistic photography, muddy details

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile game VFX sprite sheet
Primary request: Create a transparent-background sprite sheet containing 8 isolated combat effect icons for a top-down post-apocalyptic vehicle combat game.
Subject: 8 effects arranged in a 4x2 grid with generous spacing
Effects to include:
1. hit spark
2. small explosion
3. medium explosion
4. warning triangle burst
5. electric orb
6. ice crystal burst
7. shield flash
8. critical hit shard burst
Style: stylized arcade combat VFX, crisp readable shapes, energetic but clean, premium mobile game FX
Lighting: bright emissive center, soft outer glow, high readability on dark backgrounds
Color palette: orange, yellow, red, electric blue, icy cyan, white highlights
Background: fully transparent
Composition: isolated effect per cell, centered, no overlap, no cutoff
Avoid: text, smoke-heavy muddy shapes, realistic fireball photography, UI frames

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile game object sprite sheet
Primary request: Create a transparent-background sprite sheet containing 8 supply chest variants for a post-apocalyptic armored car survival game.
Subject: 8 isolated chest designs arranged in a 4x2 grid, each centered in its own cell
Variants to include:
1. firepower chest normal
2. control chest normal
3. resource chest normal
4. rare chest normal
5. firepower chest elite
6. control chest elite
7. resource chest elite
8. rare chest rare
Style: rugged industrial loot chests, armored metal panels, bolts, warning stripes, glowing seams, wasteland mech aesthetic
Visual differentiation:
- firepower: warm orange-red emphasis
- control: blue-gray electric emphasis
- resource: brass-yellow utility emphasis
- rare: violet-gold rare-tech emphasis
- elite and rare variants should feel more premium and reinforced
Lighting: polished game asset lighting, clear silhouettes, subtle glow accents
Background: fully transparent
Composition: one chest per cell, consistent angle, no overlap, no cutoff
Avoid: text, logos, environment background, characters, excessive realism
